title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CITY OF REDMOND UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides the opportunity for reduced monthly utility (water, sewage, and stormwater) bills. 411 SW 9th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Residential customers who meet income limits Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm; closed holidays Email (541) 923-7765 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 923-7765 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Redmond Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF REDMOND If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF REDMOND
